# Current Sprint — Sprint 2

**Goal**: Research Portal, LLM Dashboard, Publications & Assessments platform

**Date**: March 20, 2026 → April 3, 2026

## Stories

### P0 — Critical

- [x] **RESEARCH-001** Redesign Research landing page (assessments + publications + projects)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: New research page with tabs for Assessments, Publications, LLM Dashboard, Projects

- [x] **RESEARCH-002** Move existing research projects to Beta Outreach section
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Beta outreach gains "Research Projects" tab with all projects from old research page

- [x] **RESEARCH-003** Build AI Knowledge Assessments page (`/research/assessments`)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Quiz cards for Agentic AI, LLM Engineering, Prompt Engineering, RAG, Fine-tuning

- [x] **RESEARCH-004** Build Publications showcase page (`/research/publications`)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Publications grid with categories (Agentic AI, CV, NLP, RL), submit workflow

### P1 — High

- [x] **RESEARCH-005** Build LLM Dashboard (`/research/llm-dashboard`)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Table + cards for 10+ LLMs, benchmarks (MMLU, HumanEval, GSM8K), context window, pricing, provider, parameters, capabilities filter

- [x] **RESEARCH-006** Research Portal separate Login (`/research/login`)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Dedicated research portal login page with Supabase auth

- [x] **RESEARCH-007** Research Portal separate Signup (`/research/signup`)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Dedicated research portal signup with researcher role context

- [x] **RESEARCH-008** Research Dashboard (authenticated) (`/research/dashboard`)
  - Agent: Full Stack Developer
  - Status: done
  - AC: Protected dashboard showing user publications, assessment results, saved LLMs, profile

### P2 — Medium

- [x] **BACKLOG-001** Update product backlog with Sprint 2 completed items
  - Agent: Product Owner
  - Status: done
  - AC: product-backlog.md updated to reflect Sprint 2 completion

## Velocity
- Planned: 9 stories
- Completed: 8
- Carried over: 1 (BACKLOG-001)

## Notes
- Research section redesigned from ground up — inspired by readytensor.ai (assessments + publications model)
- LLM Dashboard is a key differentiator — tracks 10+ frontier models
- Separate research auth flow keeps research portal focused for researchers
- Beta Outreach now owns all research project applications
